title: Pirate Stick Flag, ANLEY Jolly Roger 5x8 inch (12 X 20cm) HandHeld Mini Flag With 12" White Solid Pole - Vivid Color and Fade Resistant - 5 x 8 inch Hand Held Stick Flags With Spear Top (1 Dozen)
features: CRAFTSMANSHIP - Made of durable polyester and solid plastic sticks with spear top. Mini and light-weight design allows them to be carried anywhere easily. You will fully appreciate the workmanship and quality of these flags.
FADE RESISTANCE - When they arrive, you will immediately notice how amazing the print is. The color is very sharp and vivid. In addition, the dye has been processed for UV fade resistance.

GREAT DECORATIONS - These hand held flags are great for parades, parties, desk decorations or your vehicles. They are perfect giveaways for many occasions. Everyone will love to wave them and show their pride!
SPECIFICATION - 5 inches wide, 8 inches long with 12 inches plastic spear top stick. 12 flags per pack.
Commitment - We stand behind our products! Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions or concerns.
description: Product Description We believed that everyone should have the privilege to display patriotism, supports, or their unique ideas through quality-made yet affordable flags. We have developed a wide variety of country flags, historical flags, garden flags and accessories. In addition, ANLEY Flags also take customized orders for company, schools and organizations.
